ab: kuliw maraurau aken a kemacu ta sivecivecik maqati sun a pasedjam tjanuaken?
ch: W:kuliw，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: kuliw, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: neka nu niaken uta aicu ni kivi.
en: I don’t have one either. This is kivi’s.

ab: maqati a pasedjam tja nu aken a palamu djaljaw sa ku pacikeli.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: bulay alapu.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: masalu pusalui anga ti kivi uta.
en: Thank you and thank kivi for me.

ab: anema kinasaljinga?
en: May I help you?

ab: uri pacikel aken taicu a drusa sapitj.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: bulai izuanan a anema?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: kisedjam anan aken taicu a tjelu a sapitj.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: bulai anga paqenetju nu tjelu a qadaw idu anga pacikel.
ch: A:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: inika nan su a pacikeli a ku siquliqulip.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: ku pinacikel anga katiyaw.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: aku nekanga ku siquliqulip.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: inika su sinipasedjam tjai piya.
en: Did you lend it to piya?

ab: inika ken a kemeljang vaik aken a kivadaq tjaimadju.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: ku pasedjamai anan sun ta ku siquliqulip.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: kivi ni piya aicu a kava a sinipasedjam tjanusun?
en: kivi, did piya lend you this coat?

ab: ini aicu vinele ni kina tjanuaken.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: a kava ni piya namaya ta su kava.
en: piya’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: qucengecengel a kava nimadju inika mamaw a nia quljau.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: kivi na kisedjam sun ta valjitjuq tjai piya?
en: kivi, did you borrow money from piya?

ab: izua uri pacikel aken tucu a qadaw ljakua na marauraw a ken a kemacu ta valjitjuq.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: semukiam sun nungida?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: nutiyaw ku sipacikel tjaimadju.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: bulai ku kikaianga ti piya.
en: Okay, I will tell piya for you.
